description:
Use this tool to create and manage a structured task list for your current coding session. This helps you track progress, organize complex tasks, and demonstrate thoroughness to the user.

Use for complex multistep tasks (3+ distinct steps), when the user provides multiple tasks or explicitly requests a todo list, and to capture requirements after new instructions. Skip it for single straightforward tasks, trivial work completable in under 3 steps, or purely conversational requests.

Keep only ONE task in_progress at a time. Mark tasks completed IMMEDIATELY after finishing; complete current tasks before starting new ones.

todos.description: The complete updated todo list (replaces existing list)
